full_text:
Xu Yan 許晏
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Yan (許晏). Sent to bribe Gongsun Yuan to Wu’s side, he was executed by the ruler to appease Wei. Xu Yan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Xu Yan lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
